Video.summary: After seven years of marriage and four kids, Evren and Crystal are still cheating on each other. Can their future really look any brighter! Then Sarah's not about to lose her first love Jeremy, but his cheating ways are reaching a boiling point!
Video.title: Face It...I Don't Want You!

Video.summary: Lisa's husband, Mickey, moved his mistress into their house 3 months ago! Then LaTasha's boyfriend, Maurice, has been cheating with transsexual Day Day! Maurice says it's over with Day Day, but much to his surprise, LaTasha won't take him back!
Video.title: Heartless Affairs!

Video.summary: A woman has sex with her sister and brother-in-law; a husband finds another lover; a stripper pretends to be a cocktail waitress; transvestite prostitute.
Video.title: Threesomes With My Sister

Video.summary: John's one moment of weakness may cost him everything; Antonio meets his online crush; Paige tries to make her boyfriend forgive her for cheating by offering him a threesome.
Video.title: WCW: Women Crushed Wednesday

Video.summary: Matt’s latest affair with Danielle’s mom’s roommate could be her mom’s breaking point! John has been experimenting with his roommate Ray behind Mahogany’s back! Rich is ready to ditch Tina for her more mature mom Shelly!
Video.title: I Want A Divorce!

Video.summary: Jamie is here today to confront her mother and they do indeed face off over Mom's bad behavior. Then Karla and Tiffany have a secret to confess to their respective husbands ... they're sleeping together!
Video.title: I'll Never Forgive You!

Video.summary: CeCe is here to tell her girlfriend, Michelle, that she is cheating with PJ who's a man! Next Silas is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating with her best friend! Then Mark recently caught his fiance, Liz, in bed with her lover, Angie!
Video.title: Hot Sex Secrets!

Video.summary: Kassi is here because she can't believe that her ex-boyfriend left her for their roommate. Then it's a sister show down when these two go head to head for the love of the same man. Plus, Bryan's girlfriend Brandy is here to tell him a secret.
Video.title: Triple Ex!

Video.summary: Kenny lived with sisters Lora and Misty, who are also his lovers but he treats them like servants. Later, Jerry confronts Kenny with the results of the 9 positive paternity tests, but Kenny says he only cares about 2 of his 9 children.
Video.title: Three Sisters Share A Man!

Video.summary: After their sex life hit the dumps, Andrew searched for satisfaction and found it with his girlfriends sister! Then Desi will do anything to keep Melissa from leaving her behind, but sleeping with her cousin was not something she planned on!
Video.title: Your Sister Gave It Up!

Video.summary: A woman is ready to give up nine years of marriage; a woman confronts her husband and his Internet lover.
Video.title: 7 Kids, a Trucker & Waffles

Video.summary: Antoine has been hiding the fact that he is gay from his family and his girlfriend. Now he wants to let them know the truth, and furthermore that he has been having a relationship with his sisters boyfriend.
Video.title: A Gay Family Affair

Video.summary: Joe’s obsession with sex toys drove Bonnie to his friend Brent! Andy wants his ex Diane back, but she’s in love with someone else! Kelli’s husband Anthony has been cheating with their neighbor!
Video.title: My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!

Image.alt: My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!
My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!
My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!

Video.summary: After Marcus got out of prison, he found his calling with the lord and quickly established himself as a minister. But he hasn't exactly freed himself of trouble, because he's been sleeping with two women, Nay and Strawberry!
Video.title: Sex With Two Sisters!

Video.summary: Rob hates his brother, Steve, and can't wait to tell him that he's sleeping with his fiancee and she's going home with him! Next Meg will make it clear to her boyfriend that she is serious about her unusual fantasy of having sex with clowns!
Video.title: Springer Scandals

Video.summary: A man suspects his girlfriend is sleeping with his uncle; a woman's boyfriend cheats with her friend.
Video.title: Five People, 8 Dogs, One Trailer

Video.summary: Jen learns that her boyfriend hooked up with a stripper and someone else; Itzy's boyfriend cheated with her cousin Zuly; Ashley takes vengeance on the "friend" who wrecked her last relationship.
Video.title: Sex Junkies

Video.summary: A Navy man suspects his girlfriend is cheating on him; a woman sleeps with her sister's boyfriend.
Video.title: A Navy Man & A Commie

Video.summary: Emani says she will do anything to win back her ex-boyfriend, but her best friend tells her why she should not; Davita's husband has a confession to make; Shannon challenges her boyfriend's other woman to a wrestling match.
Video.title: Bestie Blindside

Video.summary: Lisa won’t sign for a divorce after her husband left. Then, Damyen confronts the man who stole his girlfriend!
Video.title: Love Affairs Disasters

Video.summary: Greg will reveal to his girlfriend, Deidra, that he secretly works as a gay, male escort. Next Madrina's boyfriend keeps cheating on her with his ex­. Then Ro-Ro has two girlfriends and today they'll force her to choose between them.
Video.title: Secret Sex Lives

Video.summary: Anthony found out he fathered Brittany’s son a year ago and now learns she’s a lesbian! Timmy tells Jaime he’s been dating Ashley online! Josh fights to get his baby mama Katie back from his best friend Nate!
Video.title: I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving

Image.alt: I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving
I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving
I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving

Video.summary: Steve helps a pregnant prostitute change her lifestyle.
Video.title: Update: Steve & The Pregnant Hooker

Video.summary: Taylor's fiance reveals the truth; Falin wants her engaged friend to know that she has been hooking up with her man; Yashisca's fiance wants to get all of his skeletons out of the closet before taking a trip down the aisle.
Video.title: Bossy Brides

Video.summary: Colby says he stays with Brentnie only for the sake of the children; Melissa's brother catches her kissing a man and tells the man's girlfriend; Sam wants to win back his girlfriend but learns that she has found someone else.
Video.title: Men Acting Fishy

Video.summary: Kiki wants to marry the man who cheated with her cousin; Tayshun blames his girlfriend for his infidelity; a porn star wants her crush to act out a scene with her.
Video.title: 50 Shades of Springer

Video.summary: Carla has been cheating on her man with his best friend and his sister! Next Yvonne will tell her friend, Marie, that she's been sleeping with her boyfriend. Then Mary Sue and her secret lover, Cory, are here to confront Mary Sue's boyfriend, Scott.
Video.title: Honey, I'm Leaving You!

Video.summary: Morgan literally dumps his fiancé at the altar for his secret lover, Victor! Next, John is leaving his fiancé, Jamie, now that his ex-wife wants him back! Later Dave is furious with his niece because she is engaged to a man of a different race.
Video.title: Outrageous Wedding Confessions

Video.summary: Beep runs a convenience store and he's fallen in love with the girlfriend of one of the patrons.
Video.title: Amazing Tales IV

Video.summary: Our cameras were at home with sisters Olivia and Catherine when Olivia confronted her older sister for sleeping with her boyfriend, Jacob. Next Jeromy has been having an affair with 2 sisters and both are now pregnant!
Video.title: Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man

Image.alt: Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man
Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man
Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man

Video.summary: Tony admits to his girlfriend that he likes to dress in women's clothes and that he secretly has a boyfriend! Next James says his wife moved back home with him but she also brought her new boyfriend!
Video.title: Bisexual Betrayals

Video.summary: Josh and Amy will find out today that their partners have been unfaithful. Next Madeline reveals to Andre that she's been sleeping with Diante. Then Quincy is engaged to Callie but what Callie doesn't know is that Quincy has been cheating with Amy.
Video.title: Invasion of the Angry Lovers
